title: Japanese Tofu Gratin
description: A Japanese-inspired tofu gratin recipe, featuring a crunchy topping and savory flavors. This dish is perfect for a quick and easy dinner.
instructions: Cut the tofu into small cubes and set aside.
In a pan, sauté the bitter melon slices until tender.
In a separate pan, toast the cubed bread until golden brown.
In a 9x9-inch baking dish, create a layer of the toasted bread.
Add a layer of the sautéed bitter melon, followed by a layer of tofu cubes.
Repeat the layers until all ingredients are used, finishing with a layer of bread.
Top with the grated cheese and gratin topping.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the cheese is melted.
